channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Six Swiss banks join forces to build a unified digital franc
item.description: The initiative brings major lenders together to trial Swiss franc stablecoin in controlled environment with real transactions

item.title: South Korea takes away exchange discretion in a major anti-phishing crackdown
item.description: The new rules apply uniform criteria for withdrawal exceptions based on account history and transaction patterns.

item.title: Oil falls, Bitcoin jumps to $72K, but is this BTC price breakout for real?
item.description: Bitcoin moved back toward $72,000 after US President Donald Trump confirmed a ceasefire agreement with Iran, sending oil prices crashing below $100.

item.title: Crypto markets rally as Trump announces two-week Iran ceasefire
item.description: Digital assets spiked as a surprise geopolitical de-escalation triggered $600 million in liquidations, sending Bitcoin toward $73,000 and boosting altcoin demand.

item.title: MEXC's new CEO wants to tame a memecoin machine without killing what made it work
item.description: A Bitget veteran, Vugar Usi inherits a top-three exchange built on zero fees, 3,000 tokens and a compliance record he himself calls a "missing point" in its growth.

item.title: Bitcoin Spikes Over $72K as Trump Announces Conditional Ceasefire With Iran
item.description: Crypto prices jumped on the announcement of a two-week ceasefire and the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz—but macro events loom.

item.title: Pre-market crypto stocks are glowing green after the ceasefire news
item.description: Bitcoin, equities, and gold rise while oil and volatility drop amid improving risk sentiment.

item.title: ARK buys $13M in Robinhood as US Treasury taps platform for Trump Accounts
item.description: Cathie Wood's ARK Invest increased its Robinhood stake after the platform was selected to operate government-backed “Trump Accounts” for youth savings and investment.

item.title: UBS partners with five banks for Swiss franc stablecoin sandbox
item.description: UBS, PostFinance, Sygnum and others launched a 2026 sandbox to test Swiss franc stablecoin use cases and blockchain payment rails in Switzerland.

item.title: Will quantum-safe cryptography slow Ethereum down? The performance tradeoff explained
item.description: Will quantum-safe cryptography slow Ethereum? It is likely to affect gas fees, validator load and network efficiency, prompting Ethereum to pursue a broader redesign strategy.

item.title: Crypto's 'AWS' Alchemy unveils tool to make AI payment systems talk to each other
item.description: Alchemy’s AgentPay addresses the problem that the agentic payment systems currently coming online don’t talk to one another.

item.title: Crypto whale holding oil shorts walks away with $2 million in profit
item.description: A trader named Loracle closed his short position in oil futures early Wednesday, pocketing $2 million in profit.

item.title: Ethereum stablecoin supply hits $180B all-time high: Token Terminal
item.description: Ethereum could see $850 billion in “new flows” by 2030 if the trend continues, according to Token Terminal.

item.title: 🇺🇸 NEW: The SEC admits some of its past crypto enforcement actions produced no investor benefit and misinterpreted federal securities laws, marking a significant shift under Chair Atkins. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE5SUnJmV2xtTW1ZaUNkTHFmNWdVLWxxendNaFFpTkIzMXFwdndHMFZVVzJnSFZxbGNYZmhwRm5ITjZXcGlIWmFfNm5ZSWExYnJpWjVWZkdCZ0NnU3dyT3Rzakw0ek4?oc=5" target="_blank">🇺🇸 NEW: The SEC admits some o…

item.title: Three Polymarket traders made timely bets on US-Iran ceasefire
item.description: Lookonchain noted that the “yes” bets were placed at probabilities between 2.9% and 10.3%, with the three wallets placing their first bets within 26 hours of the announcement.

item.title: Coinbase plans expansion to stock trading in Australia after securing license
item.description: The approval puts Coinbase under Australia’s financial rules as the country formalizes oversight of crypto platforms.

item.title: U.S. bank with $1.9 trillion in assets could debut its bitcoin ETF Wednesday
item.description: Morgan Stanley's bitcoin ETF could start trading on NYSE on Wednesday under the ticker MSBT.

item.title: Ethereum buyers are back, data shows, as bulls defend $2K support
item.description: Ethereum analysts said buyers were back in control, but holding the $2,000 support was key to reversing the market structure.

item.title: Attacking bitcoin mining with a quantum computer would require the energy of a star, academics say
item.description: One paper finds that attacking the bitcoin blockchain through quantum mining would demand the energy output of a star. Another replicates every major "quantum factoring breakthrough" using a 1981 home computer and a dog.

item.title: XRP zooms 5% on bitcoin strength, but trend reversal still unconfirmed
item.description: Breakout backed by institutional flows and whale buying, though broader downtrend and weak ETF demand cap conviction.

item.title: Morgan Stanley's Bitcoin ETF set to launch on Wednesday
item.description: The Morgan Stanley Bitcoin Trust will be the cheapest Bitcoin ETF on the market at an ultra-low 0.14% fee.

item.title: The mystery of Satoshi Nakamoto, the pseudonymous inventor of Bitcoin, has remained unsolved for 17 years. Not anymore. Read my 18-month investigation to find out who Satoshi really is. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE5faThuUzljYW54WWNvTDBSc01rU3N1UUpJdnZJWWRoSkJkMjR1aEZiSnJsc294WHFSUkF4d3FqbGQzTTVENGxsNm05S21oRUFtYVpIMXRYYjNjMkloUjhDN3l5LS0?oc=5" target="_blank">The mystery of Satoshi Nakamoto…

item.title: 🔥 NEW: Bitcoin long-term holders have expanded their holdings to 4.37 million $BTC as of April 7, signaling sustained supply absorption, per CryptoQuant. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTFBidjhJYlk2c29yU3ZPd1E2UnVrWmE4dG9EdEJBSXpCcFJSWVBEeDF2b0NOTDd3R0tyQ0h1RmJfaTFjYl9BcnRUQUlLeUMxRi1HcVF6NjlreWRTWi1LSWtxc3EydVg?oc=5" target="_blank">🔥 NEW: Bitcoin long-term holde…

item.title: Anthropic limits access to AI model over cyberattack concerns
item.description: AI models have reached a level of coding capability that rivals or exceeds that of most human experts at finding and exploiting software vulnerabilities, Anthropic said.

item.title: Bitcoin, ether, oil shorts lead $427 million wipeout on US-Iran ceasefire
item.description: Short sellers betting on continued war escalation lost $427 million in 24 hours as bitcoin vaulted past $72,000 on the ceasefire announcement.

item.title: SEC admits certain crypto enforcement cases delivered no investor benefit
item.description: Under SEC Chair Paul Atkins, the number of SEC enforcement actions against public companies has decreased by about 30%.

item.title: FDIC moves to regulate stablecoin issuers under the GENIUS Act
item.description: FDIC’s proposed rules providing insurance for corporate deposits of stablecoin issuers will not extend to the stablecoin holders, as it would conflict with the GENIUS Act’s text, the FDIC said.

item.title: Bitcoin reclaims $72K after US, Iran agree to 2-week ceasefire
item.description: Iran's Supreme National Security Council on Wednesday accepted a two-week ceasefire with the US, but emphasized this did not mean an end to the war.

item.title: Iran’s Bitcoin hashrate falls 77% over the past quarter amid conflict
item.description: The 30-day simple moving average of the global network hashrate has also declined, though an analyst says the slump is due to Bitcoin prices hurting mining profitability rather than conflict.

item.title: CZ says SBF asked for billions 'like a Bologna sandwich' as FTX collapsed
item.description: In his new memoir, Changpeng Zhao reveals he signed the FTX letter of intent as a formality and calls Caroline Ellison's $22 floor price offer a "fatal mistake."

item.title: Crypto billionaire to prison: CZ’s autobiography revisits turbulent Binance era
item.description: Changpeng Zhao’s memoir recounts Binance’s rapid rise, regulatory scrutiny and prison sentence, offering a first-person account of crypto’s most turbulent era.

item.title: Bitcoin vaults past $72,000 as U.S. stock futures surge on a two‑week U.S.–Iran ceasefire
item.description: Risk assets rose late Tuesday as oil collapsed after Trump and Iran confirmed the two-week ceasefire.

item.title: Solana Exchange Stabble Warns Users to Pull Liquidity After North Korean Hacker Scare
item.description: A decentralized exchange on Solana urged its users to exit after a former executive was alleged to be a North Korean hacker.

item.title: Bitcoin wallets absorb 4.37M BTC as network activity flips to ‘bull phase’
item.description: The Bitcoin supply held in long-term investor wallets moved above 4 million BTC, while a network activity index flashed a “bull phase” signal.

item.title: Democrats question CFTC chair on insider trading in prediction markets
item.description: The seven House members may have affirmed the commission’s authority over prediction markets, but they questioned its inaction on insider trading.

item.title: Trump DOJ Rejects Tornado Cash Developer’s Newest Argument for Dismissal
item.description: Prosecutors said a recent Supreme Court ruling should have no bearing on Tornado Cash developer Roman Storm’s looming retrial.

item.title: Aave Token Falls Near 2-Year Low as Risk Management Firm Becomes Latest to Depart
item.description: Decentralized lending giant Aave's native token fell near a 2-year-low price following news that another ecosystem contributor is leaving.

item.title: FDIC Reveals Proposed Rules for Stablecoin Issuers Under GENIUS Act
item.description: The FDIC’s proposal establishes federal oversight standards for stablecoin issuers while explicitly excluding tokens from deposit insurance protections.

item.title: Bitcoin rises past $69,000 as risk markets reverse big early losses on hope for Iran deal
item.description: Iran's government is reportedly reviewing Pakistan's request for a two-week ceasefire positively, according to an Axios report.

item.title: Bitcoin Threatens to Break Support as Trump Threatens to Destroy Iran
item.description: Trump threatened to erase an entire civilization by tonight, and markets—including Bitcoin—are predictably on edge.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: Spot Bitcoin ETF inflows top $471M but BTC is pinned under $70K: Here’s why
item.description: Bitcoin ETF inflows hit $471 million, but stress on digital asset treasuries, selling from miners, and the war in Iran are keeping BTC stuck below $70,000.

item.title: Americans lost $11B to crypto scams in 2025, says FBI
item.description: According to the bureau, a large number of minors aged 17 and younger were included in complaints related to crypto or crypto ATMs, resulting in more than $5 million in losses.

item.title: 'Captive Audience' Could Drive Demand for Morgan Stanley's Bitcoin ETF: Bloomberg Analyst
item.description: Morgan Stanley is joining the Bitcoin ETF party late, but Bloomberg's Eric Balchunas says the investment bank isn't showing up empty-handed.

item.title: Fifth Element Star Milla Jovovich Reveals AI Memory Tool MemPalace
item.description: The Fifth Element and Resident Evil star reveals an AI project inspired by the ancient “memory palace” method.

item.title: Argentine President Milei’s call logs link him to multimillion-dollar Libra rug pull: NYT
item.description: Court records show repeated contact with a key operator before and after the token’s launch as prosecutors examine his role

item.title: Stablecoin issuers get closer to U.S. federal rules with FDIC's new proposal
item.description: The Federal Deposit Insurance Corp. approved a proposed rule to govern the issuers, even as the Senate continues to debate GENIUS Act details.

item.title: Solana Foundation to Help Secure DeFi Protocols Following $285 Million Drift Hack
item.description: The Solana Foundation will offer tiered security services to DeFi protocols, marking a shift toward institutionalized protection following the Drift exploit.

item.title: Trump-linked World Liberty faces scrutiny over ties to sanctioned network: The Times
item.description: A deal with an Asia-based blockchain project followed recent links to individuals later sanctioned over alleged ties to a major fraud network

item.title: ‘Don’t waste time with crypto': Here is what Solana Foundation's cryptic message really means
item.description: The foundation says it is becoming a leading network for “agentic payments.”

item.title: DeFi yields are crashing so hard that they can't compete with a traditional savings account
item.description: DeFi yields have collapsed below TradFi rates, forcing investors to face higher smart contract risks for lower returns as regulation and exploits mount.

item.title: Phone Logs Show Seven Calls Between Milei and LIBRA Backer on Launch Night: Report
item.description: New evidence from Argentina's federal probe into LIBRA complicates Milei's claim he had no ties to the meme coin.

item.title: . @cz_binance built the world’s largest crypto exchange from zero, then lost his freedom for 4 months. In prison, he wrote his memoir on a shared computer, 15 min at a time. I'm sitting down with him LIVE on April 8, 8pm ET. Drop your questions. The best ones - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE9ZNE1oWWRIdy10c2ZXYU82Vm9XTHRKaWpfMndjUlZ3V0ZJaFBBVWxOc2dNd0lvUEhGRDFwdlhJMUltTlc0VkZyS2FUY08xMVZIZW9JdFhEQV9iRTdVZXdSLWh3?oc=5" target="_blank">. @cz_binance built the world’s la…

item.title: Americans’ losses to crypto scams rose to over $11 billion last year, FBI reports
item.description: Fraud schemes grew more sophisticated and targeted larger sums than in 2024.

item.title: XRP ETFs Outpace Bitcoin as Crypto Funds Bounce Back After Down Week
item.description: Bitcoin usually drives investment action around crypto ETFs, but last week, XRP led as overall crypto fund flows flipped positive.

item.title: CME Set to Launch Avalanche, Sui Futures Ahead of 24/7 Crypto Derivatives Trading Shift
item.description: CME Group is adding to its list of crypto derivatives contracts, expanding to include Avalanche and Sui in early May.

item.title: JUST IN: Morgan Stanley's spot Bitcoin ETF to begin trading tomorrow. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTFBYZzdIYmRXdjRoaEgtcU5vQnVSZDV3X2VDRFpUYnlKYWxhMTJzdWxOMFJXODBma3hZY0pLUzlHbFFaN1FjbzFZbzQ5UXJaaG9DS2ZwazJIcWFuelpZMEp3dGNB?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Morgan Stanley's spot Bit…

item.title: Which do you choose? #bitcoin - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTFB6VUE4RlNQcjlGeGhXOS1QMTV1Z2diZTE0Q3FGbVhGaGNvZzFjSjkyQU9qLWgyQ1JWZ01Odm1ka0o1clh5czVSVEFvbUpXNkc5bjJ6VS1EaTliNDdDOXRBbDI1cw?oc=5" target="_blank">Which do you choose? #bitcoin</a…

item.title: BREAKING: Morgan Stanley's spot Bitcoin ETF to go live tomorrow — Bloomberg's Eric Balchunas 🚀 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE5vUW1lSUR1M2NXdVNNeTZhakpqVXBiRHdiSGpzZWlDbzVnVTFraVN1LTcwaDd0djVzdHBwcW5XbHhVRlRpWFdlcWU5T0lDdnY3dWlpLTMtSlh6YjB1M1BNaFEyQzJVV1k?oc=5" target="_blank">BREAKING: Morgan Stanley's …

item.title: Morgan Stanley Bitcoin ETF $MBST going effective tomorrow looks like, Wed 4/8, via NYSE listing notice. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE1od1pBWGo3ZktBTjcxd0J5bm9UN3BEWFRjUzF6ZXlHZmlpZndFZ2gxU1g3STVDQk9nZWRNOHRPQTV0aUh6M2FFcFlrRThIS2daTjQzN3F3UmhGeWpZbzMxYkt0S0k?oc=5" target="_blank">Morgan Stanley Bitcoin ETF $MBS…
